meaning: n.电传打字机,电报交换机,打字电报通讯v.用电传打字机拍发
examples: The teletype machine looks like an electric typewriter.
Instead we can use a special typewriter called a teletype.
The Model 33 Teletype keyboard connected to the computer Mr Tomlinson was using only had about 12 punctuation characters.
Market technicians never like to be wrong for more than 15 minutes, so Joe detected every squiggle in the market and fired off snappy teletype messages to the brokers throughout E.
